SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.dao

Interface CollectedFossilDao

public interface CollectedFossilDao
Data Access Object interface for CollectedFossil entity. Provides methods for managing fossils collected by users, including filtering by favorites and tracking collection statistics.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    delete(CollectedFossil collectedFossil)
    Deletes a collected fossil from the database.
    List<CollectedFossil>
    getAllCollectedFossilsForUser(long userId)
    Retrieves all collected fossils for a specific user.
    LiveData<List<CollectedFossil>>
    getAllCollectedFossilsForUserOrderByDate(long userId)
    Retrieves all collected fossils for a specific user ordered by collection date (newest first) as observable live data.
    List<CollectedFossil>
    getAllWithoutFossilForUser(long userId)
    Retrieves all collected fossils for a specific user that don't have associated fossil stats yet.
    List<CollectedFossil>
    getCollectedFossilById(long id)
    Retrieves collected fossils by their primary key ID.
    int
    getCollectedFossilCountByUser(long userId)
    Retrieves the total count of collected fossils for a specific user.
    List<CollectedFossil>
    getCollectedFossilsByUserAndFavorite(long userId, boolean isFavorite)
    Retrieves collected fossils for a specific user filtered by favorite status.
    LiveData<List<CollectedFossil>>
    getCollectedFossilsByUserAndFavoriteOrderByDate(long userId, boolean isFavorite)
    Retrieves collected fossils for a specific user filtered by favorite status and ordered by collection date (newest first) as observable live data.
    long
    insert(CollectedFossil collectedFossil)
    Inserts a new collected fossil into the database.
    int
    update(CollectedFossil collectedFossil)
    Updates an existing collected fossil record.
    int
    updateRange(Collection<CollectedFossil> collectedFossils)
    Updates multiple collected fossils in a batch operation.

  • Method Details

    • insert

      long insert(CollectedFossil collectedFossil)
      Inserts a new collected fossil into the database.
      Parameters:
      collectedFossil - Collected fossil to insert.
      Returns:
      Generated primary key ID.

    • update

      int update(CollectedFossil collectedFossil)
      Updates an existing collected fossil record.
      Parameters:
      collectedFossil - Collected fossil to update.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated (should be 1).

    • updateRange

      int updateRange(Collection<CollectedFossil> collectedFossils)
      Updates multiple collected fossils in a batch operation.
      Parameters:
      collectedFossils - Collection of collected fossils to update.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • getCollectedFossilById

      List<CollectedFossil> getCollectedFossilById(long id)
      Retrieves collected fossils by their primary key ID.
      Parameters:
      id - Collected fossil ID.
      Returns:
      List of collected fossils with the specified ID.

    • getAllCollectedFossilsForUser

      List<CollectedFossil> getAllCollectedFossilsForUser(long userId)
      Retrieves all collected fossils for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      List of all collected fossils for the specified user.

    • getAllCollectedFossilsForUserOrderByDate

      LiveData<List<CollectedFossil>> getAllCollectedFossilsForUserOrderByDate(long userId)
      Retrieves all collected fossils for a specific user ordered by collection date (newest first) as observable live data.
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing list of collected fossils ordered by date.

    • getCollectedFossilsByUserAndFavorite

      List<CollectedFossil> getCollectedFossilsByUserAndFavorite(long userId, boolean isFavorite)
      Retrieves collected fossils for a specific user filtered by favorite status.
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      isFavorite - Whether to retrieve favorite or non-favorite fossils.
      Returns:
      List of collected fossils matching the favorite status.

    • getCollectedFossilsByUserAndFavoriteOrderByDate

      LiveData<List<CollectedFossil>> getCollectedFossilsByUserAndFavoriteOrderByDate(long userId, boolean isFavorite)
      Retrieves collected fossils for a specific user filtered by favorite status and ordered by collection date (newest first) as observable live data.
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      isFavorite - Whether to retrieve favorite or non-favorite fossils.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing list of collected fossils matching the favorite status, ordered by date.

    • getAllWithoutFossilForUser

      List<CollectedFossil> getAllWithoutFossilForUser(long userId)
      Retrieves all collected fossils for a specific user that don't have associated fossil stats yet.
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      List of collected fossils without fossil stats.

    • getCollectedFossilCountByUser

      int getCollectedFossilCountByUser(long userId)
      Retrieves the total count of collected fossils for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      Total number of fossils collected by the user.

    • delete

      int delete(CollectedFossil collectedFossil)
      Deletes a collected fossil from the database.
      Parameters:
      collectedFossil - Collected fossil to delete.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted (should be 1).
